title: penstemon gormanii
intro: Penstemon gormanii, also known as Gorman's beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Penstemon gormanii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The herbal preparations of Penstemon gormanii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
